cells.rationale: Cross-cutting runtime publication must preserve subtle identity, provenance, routing, and credential-boundary invariants across the CLI, telemetry, and Pi companion.
This is substantial but well-specified multi-file implementation of explicit JSON, routing-authority, compatibility, and side-effect-free inspection contracts.
Durable intent freezing, transition semantics, idle re-evaluation, and firing/cancellation races require preserving subtle lifecycle correctness invariants across many protocol surfaces.
Consolidating user-facing documentation and sharpening skill trigger boundaries requires wording judgment and careful semantic alignment with the landed interfaces.
